message:
fix(storage): append OFFSET clause in list_issues; treat empty external_ref as None

list_issues honoured filters.limit but silently ignored filters.offset,
making pagination via OFFSET unusable. The OFFSET clause is now emitted
inside the existing LIMIT block when offset > 0. external_ref was
fetched with get_opt_str, returning Some("") for empty DB values;
switch to get_non_empty_str to normalize empty strings to None.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
